rejected_deltas.summary: Do not write actor private_interpretation into other participants as known fact.
rejected_deltas.rationale: Listener appraisals must infer from observable action only.

deferred_deltas.summary: Do not compile branches until more accepted turns exist.
deferred_deltas.rationale: Pilot gate is receipt-chain validation, not IF compilation.

authority_notes: Manual coordinator review applies deltas from event and appraisal receipts. Future model stages should learn this organ from the receipt shape.
post_state_summary: False-Seam pattern is directed into the formal maintenance log.; Nara has reason to trust Lio slightly more with substance of refusal.; Refusal becomes more repeatable because it enters shared record without immediate collapse.

review.rationale: Mutation receipt records prior refs, accepted/rejected/deferred deltas, authority, and rationale.
